name: Tofu Chocolate Dessert
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp maple syrup (or other sweetener) or to taste
3/4 cup cold water or soy milk
Prepared and cooled 9 inch pie crust of your choice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cube tofu and process in food processor until very smooth.
2. Add vanilla and maple syrup while continuing to blend.
3. Stop and add tahini, then continue to blend (mixture will clump up but smooth out with continued processing).
4. Add liquid in two or more additions, blending between each addition.
5. Divide mixture into two bowls; leave one half in the processor.
6. Fold walnuts into one of the mixtures until combined.
7. Mix cocoa powder into the other mixture until incorporated.
8. Blend tofu and cocoa mixture till smooth.
9. Spread the two mixtures into a prepared and cooled pie crust.
10. Swirl the vanilla and chocolate layers together for an attractive appearance.
11. Chill thoroughly before serving with whipped cream or rice dream (available at health food store).
